steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice most effectively uses data from the table. The passage has already defined nameplate capacity and established that Hallett Wind Farm is in Australia. An effective use of the data must cite a specific number from the table and connect it to a meaningful point.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — names Hallett Wind Farm, its location, and its 351-megawatt nameplate capacity: Combines the farm's name, country, and the precise figure from the table in one focused sentence. ✓
  • Choice B — describes general wind farm operations: Does not cite any specific figure from the table, so it fails to use the data. ✗
  • Choice C — omits the nameplate capacity number: Mentions Hallett but drops the 351-megawatt statistic the question requires using. ✗
  • Choice D — defines nameplate capacity without linking it to Hallett: Re-explains a term already defined and never connects it to the table's data for this specific farm. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
